subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of God! What ye had written was noted. All its contents and meanings [were considered] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان الهی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید جمیع مضامین و معانی وله و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
